manual_boundaries: integrity validation cross-checks status, blockers, repair rows, paths, and mutation boundaries
integrity validation is audit-only and never starts runtime processes or broker mutation

rows.detail: Public stress artifact must keep the minimum operator-facing contract.
Status must be derived from the current blocker set.
Summary blocker count must equal the blocker array length.
Certified status is only valid with zero blockers, and zero blockers must certify.
Every blocker must name one owner and one next repair action.
Repair rows must describe visible blockers, not unrelated work.
Output files must stay in state, docs/audits, or frontend/public.
Source path references must be relative repo artifact paths.
Manual boundaries must explicitly preserve no direct order/close mutation for this audit.
Mutation leak blocker must appear only when mutation rows exist.
Parallel workers must stay signal-only; broker mutation belongs to the unified executor.
Self-validation blocker must mirror the self-validation state.
Replay-validation blocker must mirror the replay-validation state.

guarded_repair_command_lines: if (($proc.CommandLine -notlike "*$($target.Contains)*")) { throw "Refusing to stop PID $($target.Pid): command line no longer matches $($target.Contains)" }
guarded_repair_command_preview: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; cd 'C:\Users\user\aureon-trading'; $targets = @(;   @{ Pid = 1628; Contains = 'aureon.exchanges.unified_market_trader'; Reason = 'duplicate_unified_market_trader, wrong_python_owner' };   @{ Pid = 20196; Contains = 'aureon.exchanges.unified_market_trader'; Reason = 'duplicate_unified_market_trader' }; ); foreach ($target in $targets) {;   $proc = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$($target.Pid)";   if ($null -eq $proc) { continue };   if (($proc.CommandLine -notlike "*$($target.Contains)*")) { throw "Refusing to stop PID $($target.Pid): command line no longer matches $($target.Contains)" };   Stop-Process -Id $target.Pid -Force; }; .\AUREON_PRODUCTION_LIVE.cmd -WaitForRefresh -MarketStatusPort 8791; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m aureon.autonomous.aureon_parallel_strategy_unity_stress_audit --json
